nasb.text: You shall not offer any strange incense on this altar, or burnt offering or meal offering; and you shall not pour out a drink offering on it.

esv.text: You shall not offer unauthorized incense on it, or a burnt offering, or a grain offering, and you shall not pour a drink offering on it.

cnv.text: 在這壇上，你們不可獻上凡香、燔祭、素祭，也不可在這壇上澆奠祭。

ccb.text: 不可在这香坛上烧别的香料，不可用这坛来献燔祭或素祭，也不可在上面浇奠祭。
